framework.name: Visa MCP Integration (Model Context Protocol)
framework.description: Visa has adopted Anthropic's MCP as a primary integration pattern — StreamableHTTP transport, tool discovery, typed tool invocations (enroll-card, initiate-purchase-instruction, retrieve-payment-credentials). This is a real, public, MIT-licensed SDK with working code, not vaporware. They also ship a Documentation MCP Server at sandbox.mcp.visa.com/mcp/doc.
framework.raw_quote: Use the Model Context Protocol with StreamableHTTP transport for standardized AI agent integration

source.title: Visa Intelligent Commerce (VIC) - Integration Starter Kit
